# services.acpid

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.acpid`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.acpid.acEventCommands` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Shell commands to execute on an ac_adapter.\* event. |
| `services.acpid.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the ACPI daemon. |
| `services.acpid.handlers` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Event handlers. ::: {.note} Handler can be a single command. ::: |
| `services.acpid.handlers.<name>.action` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Shell commands to execute when the event is triggered. |
| `services.acpid.handlers.<name>.event` | `string` | Event type. |
| `services.acpid.lidEventCommands` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Shell commands to execute on a button/lid.\* event. |
| `services.acpid.logEvents` | `boolean` | Log all event activity. |
| `services.acpid.powerEventCommands` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Shell commands to execute on a button/power.\* event. |
